objects.name: When Wi-Fi Encryption Fails: Protecting Your Enterprise from AirSnitch Attacks
objects.description: Unit 42 research reveals AirSnitch attacks bypass WPA2/3 Wi-Fi encryption and client isolation, exposing critical infrastructure vulnerabilities. The post When Wi-Fi Encryption Fails: Protecting Your Enterprise from AirSnitch Attacks appeared first on Unit 42 .

external_references.description: When Wi-Fi Encryption Fails: Protecting Your Enterprise from AirSnitch Attacks
